name: Compare JSON
description: An online tool for comparing differences between two JSON data structures, helping you quickly locate the differences in JSON data

name: HS Ping
description: A multi-country HS (Harmonized System) and HTS (Harmonized Tariff System) code lookup API, with a free plan offering 100 lookups/day

name: OnlineGDB
description: A free online ide thats supports 40+ languages and is pre installed with tons of libraries; and also has a debugging option, flags, tutorials, and a QNA page!
